query: SELECT q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.clientId, q.total, q.status, q.createdAt, c.name FROM quotations q LEFT JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id WHERE q.quotationNumber LIKE '%3034338%' OR q.quotationNumber LIKE '%1307560%' OR q.quotationNumber LIKE '%Jhonier%' OR q.quotationNumber LIKE '%Lina%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.clientId, q.total, q.status, q.createdAt, c.name FROM quotations q LEFT JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id WHERE q.quotationNumber LIKE '%3034338%' OR q.quotationNumber LIKE '%1307560%' OR q.quotationNumber LIKE '%Jhonier%' OR q.quotationNumber LIKE '%Lina%'
